channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hantavirus live updates: CDC tells US doctors be aware of imported hantavirus cases
item.description: The MV Hondius cruise ship, on which the hantavirus infection was identified, is making its way to the Canary Islands.

item.title: WATCH: Great gift ideas to make Mother's Day memorable for mom
item.description: ABC News Live's Stephanie Ramos talks to parenting expert Katy Huie Harrison about Mother's Day gifts that can help mom relax on her day.

item.title: The Uplift: Desmond Bryant
item.description: David Begnaud sits down with former NFL player Desmond Bryant, who shares how he survived a dark period in his life – and came out helping others.

item.title: Frontier Airlines jet strikes individual on runway at Denver airport
item.description: A Frontier Airlines flight taking off for Los Angeles from Denver International Airport on Friday night appeared to strike an individual walking on ru...
